string.text: lower values brings the scope closer when you're using ironsights
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with integrated scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using attached grenade launchers
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1p78 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1PN93 thermal scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1PN93 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1p29 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PS01 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PS02 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1PN93-4 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PGO-7 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with 1p59 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PU scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with ZF4 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with G43 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PO 4x34 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Monstrum scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with ACOG scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Trihawk scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with G36 picatinny scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Winchester Side scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Vulcan scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Susat scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Bravo4 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with HAMR scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Specter scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Tac30 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with UH1 Magnifiers
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with XPS3 Magnifiers
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with D-Evo scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PN23 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Razor HD scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with PS320 scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with CQBSS scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with March Shorty scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Ado scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Gauss sights
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Cortex scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with March F Tactical scopes
lower values brings the scope closer when you're using guns with Skeet X IR thermal clip on. This should be kept the same as your integrated scope setting.
Brings the weapon you're holding further away by incrementing zoom hud fov
Brings the weapon you're holding closer by decrementing zoom hud fov
Sets your zoom hud fov on the weapon you're holding to back to normal
Update MCM to see this feature. Key defaults to Numpad + and - and Backspace for resetting current gun
